codeSystems.name: ACCESSAlignmentResultCS
codeSystems.title: ACCESS Alignment Request Result Codes
codeSystems.description: This codesystem defines codes indicating the result of a requested alignment.

codeSystems.name: ACCESSEligibilityResultCS
codeSystems.title: ACCESS Eligibility Result Codes
codeSystems.description: This codesystem defines codes indicating the result of an eligibility check.

codeSystems.name: ACCESSEventTypeCS
codeSystems.title: ACCESS Event Types
codeSystems.description: This codesystem defines codes for the types of events that trigger subscription notifications in the ACCESS Model.

codeSystems.name: ACCESSTrackCS
codeSystems.title: ACCESS Model Tracks
codeSystems.description: This codesystem defines codes for each of the ACCESS Model tracks.

codeSystems.name: ACCESSUnalignmentReasonCS
codeSystems.title: ACCESS Unalignment Reason Codes
codeSystems.description: This codesystem defines the codes indicating the reason for the requested unalignment.

codeSystems.name: ACCESSUnalignmentResultCS
codeSystems.title: ACCESS Unalignment Request Result Codes
codeSystems.description: This codesystem defines the codes indicating the result of a requested unalignment.
